{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = The Emperor (Cradle)
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The Emperor received a dream tablet from an [[Underlord]] demanding punishment for [[Eithan]]'s actions in [[Serpent's Grave]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c22">''Blackflame'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The Emperor is drinking wine.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c22" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
